req.title: Account statement generation (boundary variant)
req.statement: A customer shall request monthly statements as PDF; statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-033 defines four key test dimensions: (1) normal in-range statement retrieval (EP positive), (2) statement exactly at the 7-year boundary switching from hot to cold storage (BVA boundary), (3) the exact month just inside the 7-year window remaining in hot storage (BVA boundary), (4) a period with no activity returning 404 (NEG), (5) cold storage unavailability returning 503 (DT/NEG). The 7-year boundary is the primary risk axis: < 7 years uses hot storage, >= 7 years uses cold storage. Equivalence classes are: valid recent month, valid cold-storage month, month with no activity, and cold-storage-unavailable state. All tests use a fixed calendar anchor to remain deterministic and idempotent.

tests.name: test_recent_statement_returns_pdf
preconditions: Account has activity in the target month (within last 7 years)
actions: Assert retrieval event is present in audit log via <audit_helper>
expected: Audit log contains retrieval record for account and month
trace: R-FIN-033: PDF delivered for valid month
tests.executable:
def test_recent_statement_returns_pdf(auth_fixture, audit_helper, base_url):
    token = auth_fixture.get_customer_token()
    month = "2024-06"
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}

    resp = <http_client>.get(f"{base_url}/statements/{month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert len(resp.content) > 0
    assert resp.headers.get("X-Storage-Tier") == "hot"
    assert audit_helper.has_retrieval_log(
        account_id=auth_fixture.account_id, month=month
    )

tests.name: test_statement_exactly_7_years_old_uses_cold_storage
preconditions: Account has activity in the month exactly 84 months (7 years) before fixed anchor 2024-07
Cold storage is available and seeded with that month's data
actions: Compute target month as anchor_year - 7 years = 2017-07
expected: Audit log contains retrieval record for cold-storage fetch
trace: R-FIN-033: statements older than 7 years fetched from cold storage
BVA: exact lower boundary of cold-storage threshold (84 months)
tests.executable:
def test_statement_exactly_7_years_old_uses_cold_storage(auth_fixture, audit_helper, base_url):
    token = auth_fixture.get_customer_token()
    month = "2017-07"  # exactly 7 years before anchor 2024-07
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}

    resp = <http_client>.get(f"{base_url}/statements/{month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert resp.headers.get("X-Storage-Tier") == "cold"
    assert len(resp.content) > 0
    assert audit_helper.has_retrieval_log(
        account_id=auth_fixture.account_id, month=month, tier="cold"
    )

tests.name: test_statement_one_month_inside_7_year_boundary_uses_hot_storage
preconditions: Account has activity in the month 83 months before anchor 2024-07 (i.e. 2017-08)
actions: Compute target month as one month newer than the 7-year boundary = 2017-08
expected: X-Storage-Tier: hot (not yet crossed into cold storage)
trace: R-FIN-033: boundary — month just inside the 7-year window stays in hot storage
BVA: upper boundary minus 1 month (83 months ago)
tests.executable:
def test_statement_one_month_inside_7_year_boundary_uses_hot_storage(auth_fixture, base_url):
    token = auth_fixture.get_customer_token()
    month = "2017-08"  # 83 months before anchor 2024-07, still hot
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}

    resp = <http_client>.get(f"{base_url}/statements/{month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert resp.headers.get("X-Storage-Tier") == "hot"

tests.name: test_statement_for_month_with_no_activity_returns_404
preconditions: Account has zero transactions in target month 2023-02
Target month is within the 7-year window
actions: Assert response body contains error code NO_ACTIVITY
expected: Error payload with code NO_ACTIVITY or equivalent
trace: R-FIN-033: 404 if no activity in period
tests.executable:
def test_statement_for_month_with_no_activity_returns_404(auth_fixture, base_url):
    token = auth_fixture.get_customer_token()
    month = "2023-02"  # seeded with zero transactions
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}

    resp = <http_client>.get(f"{base_url}/statements/{month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 404
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error_code") == "NO_ACTIVITY"
    assert resp.headers.get("Content-Type", "").startswith("application/json")

tests.name: test_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503
preconditions: Account has activity in target month 2016-01 (older than 7 years)
Cold storage is configured to be unavailable via <fault_injection_fixture>
actions: Assert response body contains error code COLD_STORAGE_UNAVAILABLE
trace: DT: decision — age > 7 years AND cold storage down => 503
tests.executable:
def test_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503(auth_fixture, fault_injection_fixture, base_url):
    token = auth_fixture.get_customer_token()
    month = "2016-01"  # older than 7 years; requires cold storage
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}

    fault_injection_fixture.disable_cold_storage()
    try:
        resp = <http_client>.get(f"{base_url}/statements/{month}", headers=headers)
    finally:
        fault_injection_fixture.restore_cold_storage()

    assert resp.status_code == 503
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error_code") == "COLD_STORAGE_UNAVAILABLE"

tests.name: test_unauthorized_request_returns_401
preconditions: No valid authentication token (missing or expired)
Account exists and has activity in target month
actions: Assert no PDF content is returned
trace: R-FIN-033: precondition account.owner == caller — unauthenticated caller must be rejected
tests.executable:
def test_unauthorized_request_returns_401(base_url):
    month = "2024-06"

    resp = <http_client>.get(f"{base_url}/statements/{month}")

    assert resp.status_code == 401
    assert resp.headers.get("Content-Type", "").startswith("application/json")
    assert "pdf" not in resp.headers.get("Content-Type", "")
